data.change_summary: Hardened milestone task-run lineage against the remaining audit gaps. The running-attempt matcher now only reuses a legacy runless row when it is the sole open attempt, so mixed legacy/named open state is rejected instead of being silently rewritten. The filesystem lineage adapter now rejects conflicting plan_hash values on both start reuse and completion finalization instead of preserving stale hashes, and malformed legacy completion-event repair now emits a warning before replacing unparseable details. Added regressions for mixed-open start rejection, plan-hash conflicts on start/completion, and the tightened legacy-running match behavior, then closed bead `ralph-burning-9ni.2.4`.
outstanding_risks: Milestone mutations still span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction; replays and milestone-scoped locking mitigate this, but a crash between file writes can still leave snapshot or journal state temporarily behind `task-runs.ndjson` until the same operation is replayed or state is reconciled from lineage.

steps.description: Inspected the milestone lineage start/update and journal-repair paths against the three pending amendments to isolate the exact model and filesystem behaviors that still allowed ambiguous reuse, silent plan-hash drops, and un-audited legacy repair.

Tightened `find_matching_running_task_run` and `FsTaskRunLineageStore::record_task_run_start` so only a sole legacy runless attempt can be reused, while mixed runless/named open attempts now fail fast as ambiguous instead of rewriting lineage.

Updated the filesystem adapter to reject conflicting `plan_hash` metadata during running-row reuse and completion finalization, and added a `tracing::warn!` on the malformed legacy completion-detail replacement fallback so operators can audit that repair path.

Added milestone_record regressions for the tightened running-match helper, mixed-open start rejection, and conflicting plan-hash failures on both start retry and completion, then reran formatting, milestone_record tests, clippy, and bead hygiene commands.

validation_evidence: `br lint` passed with no template warnings (`76 issues checked`).
`br close ralph-burning-9ni.2.4 --reason="Completed"` succeeded, and `br sync --flush-only` reported no dirty issues to export.
